Content.title: Content
Content.description: Metadata for a movie, series, or music video.

description.description: A detailed summary of the content.

thumbnailUrl.description: URL to the content's thumbnail image.

videoUrl.description: URL to the content's video file.

category.description: The main category of the content.

genre.description: List of genres associated with the content.

releaseYear.description: The year the content was released.

isPremium.description: Whether the content requires a premium subscription.

createdAt.description: When the content was added to the platform.

uid.description: The user's unique ID from Firebase Auth.

role.description: The user's role on the platform.

myList.description: List of content IDs in the user's 'My List'.

WatchHistory.title: WatchHistory
WatchHistory.description: A record of a user's progress on a specific piece of content.

userId.description: The ID of the user who watched the content.

contentId.description: The ID of the content being watched.

watchedAt.description: When the user last watched this content.

/content/{contentId}.description: Collection of all available streaming content.

/history/{historyId}.description: Collection of user watch history and progress.
